object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"James Park"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Tech Reviewer"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","5 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"January 14, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Noise cancellation, comfort over long hours, call quality, price — everything you need to choose the right audio for your workday."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-audio-question-everyone-has","children":"The Audio Question Everyone Has"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you work from home or in an open office, audio is not optional — it is infrastructure. Whether you are blocking out background noise, taking calls, or just signalling to the world that you are in focus mode, the device on your ears shapes your entire day."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The question is not which is better. The question is which is better for you and how you work."}}],["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-case-for-over-ear-headphones","children":"The Case for Over-Ear Headphones"}],["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Noise cancellation is stronger.</strong> Over-ear headphones have larger drivers and more physical mass to attenuate sound. Premium over-ear headphones (Sony XM5, Bose QC45) effectively silence open offices, cafés, and home environments."}}],"$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b"]}],"$L3c","$L3d","$L3e"]}],"$L3f"]}]]}]
40:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
41:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
42:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524758631624-e2822e304c36?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1519389950473-47ba0277781c?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
29:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>More comfortable for very long sessions.</strong> This is counterintuitive — headphones feel heavier. But pressure is distributed across the head and ears rather than concentrated in the ear canal. Most people find over-ear headphones more comfortable after four-plus hours."}}]
2a:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Better sound quality.</strong> For music, podcasts, and general listening, over-ear headphones produce richer, more spacious sound."}}]
2b:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best over-ear picks:</strong>"}}]
2c:["$","ul","8",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Sony WH-1000XM5</em>: The benchmark for ANC. Superb noise cancellation, excellent sound, comfortable for long sessions."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Bose QuietComfort 45</em>: Softer, lighter than Sony. Slightly less aggressive ANC but outstanding comfort."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Apple AirPods Max</em>: Exceptional sound and ANC. Best if you are deeply in the Apple ecosystem."}}]]}]
2d:["$","h2","9",{"id":"the-case-for-earbuds","children":"The Case for Earbuds"}]
2e:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Portability and convenience.</strong> Earbuds go in your pocket or bag without a case taking up space. On-the-go switching between desk, meeting room, and commute is frictionless."}}]
2f:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Better for calls in many situations.</strong> Modern earbuds have microphones positioned closer to the mouth, which often results in better call clarity than the boom-free mics on over-ear headphones."}}]
30:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Less fatiguing for people with glasses.</strong> Over-ear headphones press on glasses frames. After hours this becomes genuinely uncomfortable. Earbuds have no such conflict."}}]
31:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best earbud picks:</strong>"}}]
32:["$","ul","14",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Apple AirPods Pro 2</em>: Outstanding ANC for the form factor. Excellent call quality. Essential if you use an iPhone."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Sony WF-1000XM5</em>: The best Android/cross-platform earbuds. Superb ANC, very good sound."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Jabra Evolve2 55</em>: Designed specifically for work calls. Exceptional microphone quality. The choice of professionals who live on video calls."}}]]}]
33:["$","h2","15",{"id":"hybrid-approach","children":"Hybrid Approach"}]
34:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Many serious remote workers use both: over-ear headphones for deep focus sessions (blocking out everything, listening to music or ambient sound), and earbuds for calls and movement around the home."}}]
35:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If budget allows, this is genuinely the best solution."}}]
36:["$","h2","18",{"id":"what-about-open-back-headphones","children":"What About Open-Back Headphones?"}]
37:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Open-back headphones (Sennheiser HD600, Beyerdynamic DT990) offer remarkable sound quality but provide no noise isolation — sound leaks in and out freely. They are excellent for solo work in quiet environments but unsuitable for calls or open offices."}}]
38:["$","h2","20",{"id":"microphone-reality-check","children":"Microphone Reality Check"}]
39:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Neither earbuds nor headphones with built-in microphones match the call quality of a dedicated USB microphone. If you spend significant time on video calls and quality matters, a simple condenser microphone (Blue Yeti Nano, Elgato Wave:3) is worth adding to your setup regardless of which headphones you choose."}}]
3a:["$","h2","22",{"id":"the-verdict","children":"The Verdict"}]
3b:["$","ul","23",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Long focused work sessions</strong> → Over-ear headphones"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Frequent calls, movement, commuting</strong> → Earbuds"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Glasses wearer doing long sessions</strong> → Earbuds"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best sound quality</strong> → Over-ear headphones"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Open office or café</strong> → Either, with strong ANC"}}]]}]
3c:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Gear","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Gear"}],[["$","$L7","headphones",{"href":"/blog/tag/headphones","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","headphones"]}],["$","$L7","earbuds",{"href":"/blog/tag/earbuds","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","earbuds"]}],["$","$L7","audio",{"href":"/blog/tag/audio","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","audio"]}],["$","$L7","focus",{"href":"/blog/tag/focus","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","focus"]}]]]}]
3d:["$","$L40",null,{"title":"Headphones vs. Earbuds for Work: An Honest Comparison","slug":"headphones-vs-earbuds-for-work"}]
3e:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L41",null,{}]}]
3f:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L42",null,{"items":[{"id":"the-audio-question-everyone-has","text":"The Audio Question Everyone Has","level":2},{"id":"the-case-for-over-ear-headphones","text":"The Case for Over-Ear Headphones","level":2},{"id":"the-case-for-earbuds","text":"The Case for Earbuds","level":2},{"id":"hybrid-approach","text":"Hybrid Approach","level":2},{"id":"what-about-open-back-headphones","text":"What About Open-Back Headphones?","level":2},{"id":"microphone-reality-check","text":"Microphone Reality Check","level":2},{"id":"the-verdict","text":"The Verdict","level":2}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"James Park","className":"w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl object-cover object-top mb-4"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"font-bold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-0.5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"James Park"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-orange-500 font-medium mb-3","children":"Tech Reviewer"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Tested hundreds of keyboards, monitors, and desk accessories.
